name: Shrimp & Wine-Sauced Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and garlic in 2 tablespoons oil.
2. Add drained tomatoes, white wine, sugar, and seasonings to the pan.
3. Cover and simmer for 25 minutes.
4. Add shrimp and return to a gentle simmer. Cook until shrimp are tender, about 5 minutes.
5. In a separate bowl, mix cornstarch with 1 tablespoon cold water.
6. Stir the cornstarch mixture into the shrimp sauce until smooth and bubbly.
7. Serve over hot spaghetti and sprinkle with basil. This dish is also excellent made with scallops or chicken.
